scripts.bump: yarn version --no-commit-hooks --no-git-tag-version && yarn bump-to && yarn workspace @molecula-monorepo/dev-expo bump && yarn workspace @molecula-monorepo/dev-expo-pool-admin bump
scripts.compile:all: yarn workspace @molecula-monorepo/solidity compile && yarn workspace @molecula-monorepo/blockchain.ethena compile
scripts.hardhatUnitTests: yarn workspace @molecula-monorepo/solidity run test && yarn workspace @molecula-monorepo/blockchain.ethena run test
scripts.eslint:fix: eslint --fix scripts *.js --resolve-plugins-relative-to . && yarn workspaces run eslint:fix
scripts.prettier:fix: prettier --write scripts *.js && yarn workspaces run prettier:fix
scripts.fix:code: turbo run eslint:fix && turbo run prettier:fix
scripts.terraform:set_default: dotenvx run --env-file=./configs/frontend-environments/shared/.env --quiet -- terraform -chdir=./frontend/web-infrustructure workspace select default
scripts.terraform:set_prod: dotenvx run --env-file=./configs/frontend-environments/shared/.env.production --quiet --env-file=./configs/frontend-environments/shared/.env -- terraform -chdir=./frontend/web-infrustructure workspace select production
scripts.terraform:staging:state: yarn terraform:set_default && dotenvx run --env-file=./configs/frontend-environments/shared/.env --quiet -- terraform -chdir=./frontend/web-infrustructure state pull > tfState.json
scripts.terraform:prod:state: yarn terraform:set_prod && dotenvx run --env-file=./configs/frontend-environments/shared/.env.production --env-file=./configs/frontend-environments/shared/.env --quiet -- terraform -chdir=./frontend/web-infrustructure state pull > tfState.json
scripts.terraform:staging: yarn terraform:staging:apply && yarn rpc-proxy:staging:deploy && yarn feature-flags-sync-service:staging:deploy
scripts.terraform:prod: yarn terraform:prod:apply && yarn rpc-proxy:prod:deploy && yarn feature-flags-sync-service:prod:deploy
scripts.test:docker:compose: NEXT_BUILD_USE_SENTRY=false NEXT_PUBLIC_ENV=prod yarn workspace @molecula-monorepo/frontend.docker-test build && docker-compose -f frontend/docker-test/docker-compose.yml up --build
scripts.test:docker:build: NEXT_BUILD_USE_SENTRY=false NEXT_PUBLIC_ENV=prod yarn workspace @molecula-monorepo/frontend.docker-test build && docker build -f frontend/docker-test/Dockerfile ./frontend/docker-test
